jd_text: MD-Level Private Banker Opportunity | Dubai UHNW Role | Join a Leading Global Private Bank A global private bank is expanding its senior front-office team in Dubai and is seeking an MD-level Private Banker to lead UHNW coverage across the Middle East, with a focus on GCC and international clients. This opportunity is ideal for a senior banker with a strong track record, portable AUM, and the ambition to grow within a platform offering world-class investment, credit, and estate planning solutions. Ideal Candidate Profile: Managing Director with 10+ years in Private Banking Established UHNW client base across GCC or international markets Proven portable AUM of USD $350M+ Trusted advisor with strong investment product knowledge and structuring capability Commercial mindset with high client retention and acquisition success Key Benefits: Global Platform – Full suite of wealth, investment banking, and credit offerings Strategic Growth Hub – Join a bank investing heavily in the Middle East Leadership Opportunity – Be part of long-term growth and regional strategy Interested candidates can share their CV in confidence to : vipul.patel@ateca.co.uk
